understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate the player character through a tile-based level by using horizontal moves and the current gravity direction to fall toward the goal gem tile ('+'), while avoiding spikes and managing turn limits. The overall objective is to complete the current level (BP35) and ultimately win the game by finishing all levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal only (MOVE_LEFT / MOVE_RIGHT), after which gravity pulls the player vertically until landing on a solid tile, hitting a spike (instant loss), or reaching the goal. In this level, gravity is DOWN, meaning the player falls toward smaller y values (upward on screen). CLICK actions remove breakable tiles ('x') at a specified position without counting as a horizontal move. UNDO can revert the previous action. Each attempt has 50 turns, and the level may be retried if an attempt fails. Safe landing tiles include 'o', 'm', and 'w', while spikes ('u' or 'v') cause failure. The fall is automatically determined based on the column the player is in after a horizontal move, and structured state previews show where left/right moves will land.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate the player character through a tile-based level by using horizontal moves and the current gravity direction to fall toward the goal gem tile ('+'), while avoiding spikes and managing turn limits. The overall objective is to complete the current level (BP35) and ultimately win the game by finishing all levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal only (MOVE_LEFT / MOVE_RIGHT), after which gravity pulls the player vertically until landing on a solid tile, hitting a spike (instant loss), or reaching the goal. In this level, gravity is DOWN, meaning the player falls toward smaller y values (upward on screen). CLICK actions remove breakable tiles ('x') at a specified position without counting as a horizontal move. UNDO can revert the previous action. Each attempt has 50 turns, and the level may be retried if an attempt fails. Safe landing tiles include 'o', 'm', and 'w', while spikes ('u' or 'v') cause failure. The fall is automatically determined based on the column the player is in after a horizontal move, and structured state previews show where left/right moves will land.
